message:
feat(tui): implement interactive timeline view with zoom and responsive layout

Replace the timeline placeholder with a fully functional timeline view
supporting event navigation, zoom control, and responsive rendering.

views.rs (+366 lines):
  Implement render_timeline_view() with adaptive layout that switches
  between stacked (narrow terminals) and side-by-side (wide terminals)
  presentation. Each timeline row displays timestamp, event type,
  source, and summary with color-coded severity indicators. Selection
  highlighting and scroll position tracking for large event sets.

app.rs (+258 lines):
  Add handle_timeline_key() supporting j/k navigation, +/- zoom
  across 6 levels (30m, 1h, 3h, 6h, 12h, 24h windows), and Enter
  for event detail expansion. Add timeline_window_ms() constant
  function mapping zoom levels to millisecond windows. Implement
  refresh_timeline_data() to fetch events based on current zoom.
  Track timeline_rows, timeline_selected_index, and timeline_zoom
  in ViewState. Update help text to document timeline controls.
  Rename "WezTerm Automata TUI" to "FrankenTerm Operator TUI" in
  help header.

Includes comprehensive test coverage with sample_timeline() helper
and keybinding tests for all timeline interactions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
